apps.name: Legacy OpenEMR
apps.description: Pinned original OpenEMR application running through Docker Compose.

seeds.name: Gold test dataset v1
seeds.description: Resets the legacy data tables and applies the 1,000-patient shared synthetic gold dataset.

seeds.name: Starter example patients
seeds.description: Imports the bundled OpenEMR example provider users and 14 patient demographics as the first visible seed.

tests.name: Baseline smoke test
tests.description: Checks health endpoint, login page, and local admin login.

tests.name: Native PHPUnit isolated suite
tests.description: Runs OpenEMR's upstream isolated PHPUnit suite in stable mode inside the pinned OpenEMR container.

tests.name: Native Jest JavaScript suite
tests.description: Runs OpenEMR's upstream JavaScript Jest suite for CCDA utilities and jsPDF compatibility.

tests.name: Gold database contract
tests.description: Runs normalized database probes against the seeded legacy MariaDB baseline.

tests.name: HTTP functional contract
tests.description: Runs health, login form, and application shell checks against the legacy baseline.

tests.name: Playwright UI contract
tests.description: Runs browser login, chart, encounter, appointment, billing, and lab-result checks against the legacy UI.

tests.name: Workflow mutation contract
tests.description: Runs deterministic demographics, scheduling, encounter-detail, clinical-list, message, prescription, billing, and lab mutation workflows with pre/post probes.

tests.name: Legacy readiness plan
tests.description: Runs the read-only database, HTTP, and UI suites as a curated baseline readiness plan.

tests.name: Isolated mutation plan
tests.description: Runs the workflow mutation suite with per-test gold-data reseeding for strongest isolation.
